MINI MINUTES: Curtis Caddell, Esq., appearing for defendant and moving party.
Defendant's Motion for reconsideration of sanctions issued by the court on 3/5/2002 to Theresa Van Beveren, Esq., in the amount of $350.00, is heard this day. Court ordered motion granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Judith Ossa. (212)
